findings: README and AGENTS disagree on branch naming: README says stampede/task-001 while AGENTS says stampede/<agent-id>/<task-id>.
Launch docs mention --model usage but not premium-model policy enforcement or restrictions.
Commander launch profile, sub-agent telemetry, Agent Pulse live counts, and stop/recovery behavior are not documented in the reviewed docs.
Atomic mv task claiming is documented, but the docs omit SwarmMesh collaboration bus details.
Queue path defaults conflict between README and AGENTS.
